issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Durable JetStream ORDERS stream with explicit ack
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses jetstreamManager.streams.add, AckPolicy.Explicit, and msg.ack(); baseline mixes patterns and often omits durable consumer creation.

scenarios.name: NATS KV session store with watch
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses js.views.kv with put/get/delete plus kv.watch() iterator, while baseline tends to default to Redis or pub/sub workarounds.
